description.zh: 代码工作台(规划中)· 目标:在 Studio 内浏览 + 跳转游戏 src/ 文件,与 cc-coder 跨对话线程协作改代码。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
description.en: Code workbench (planned) — will browse and jump through a game's src/ files inside Studio and collaborate with cc-coder across chat threads. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel lands in a later sprint.
